---
description: Self-review the pending changes on this branch before requesting code review.
agent: PR Prep
---
Prepare a developer self-review for the pending changes on the current branch.

If it's ambiguous, ask me which base branch to compare against (e.g. `main`). Then run the full
PR Prep flow: (1) the digest + self-review report written to `./.pr-review/`, (2) propose concise
numbered step-comments in the changed code and apply them once I confirm, (3) walk me through an
understanding check, and (4) draft a PR description from this repo's PR template, prompting me for
anything missing (ticket, rollout, testing).
